checks.name: public repository credential and private path scan
GitHub Actions supply-chain pinning
checks.summary: Third-party workflow actions are pinned to immutable release commit SHAs.

residual_risks: The Sprint 01 HTTP boundary is local and unauthenticated; authenticated MCP and policy controls belong to Sprint 03.
State is intentionally volatile until PostgreSQL durability and idempotency are implemented in Sprint 02.
Pattern-based redaction is defense in depth and does not replace a secret manager or sanitized worker environments.
